individual_reviews.title: Bad college, bad campus, no placement, and bad behavior of teachers.

content.Placements: No placement, no rules, no recutting, no internship without any problem. You got a problem: no highest and no lowest. It makes a caste problem in class. No package, no student gets rules, no recutting in companies for our course. No one got a job from the university.
content.Infrastructure: Bad meals and bad behavior of the warden. Bad labs, no equipment, dirty floors, and bad behavior of lab teachers. Bad facilities and bad behavior of teachers. No medicine was available in college, and the canteen staff had bad behavior. No sports games, huh.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Worth the money, go for it.

content.Placements: About 60-70% of students are placed at my university. The highest package is 30 LPA, the average package is 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 5-8 LPA. About 70% of students got internships, which prepared them for industrial training.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of my university are awesome. Wi-Fi is available both on campus and in the hostels. The mess facilities are also good. The food provided in the hostel and canteen is great. Medical facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is decent, but prefer at least a preference type, not bad.

content.Placements: I got to know that the seniors got decent placement somewhere, like 3 LPA type, in the starting phase of industrial training. They gave one internship in our 3rd year, and almost 70% student get decent placements in industry or private business setups, and companies are Cipla, Dr Reddy's, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Department is too heavy timing, in fact, everything is decent, classroom, labs and Wi-Fi, but no off on the weekend. Mess and canteen are dirty, and cringe. Sports and games are too messy for all students, not a good investment in sports funding. In fact, the gym equipment is too old and corroded.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Worth the money for the course.

content.Placements: 60 to 70% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is 30 to 40 LPA, the average package is 10 to 15 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Flipkart, and Infosys. 60 to 80% of students got internships in the course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are very awesome, feels like home. The Wi-Fi facilities in classrooms and hostels are also good. The food facilities provided in the mess and canteen are very nice. Medicine facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is awesome.

content.Placements: About 60-70% of students got placed. The highest package is 40 LPA - 50 LPA, and the average package is 15 LPA - 20 LPA. The lowest salary is 8 LPA - 10 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Flipkart, Wipro, etc. Almost 50% of students got internships from the college in their field.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures of the college is very nice. Wi-Fi facility is available in both the hostel and campus. The rooms and facilities in the hostel are also good. The food provided in mess and canteen is also good. Medical and sports facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in the Tirupati surroundings.

review_content.Placements: Siddharth College students get placed with a package of 40 LPA. Placements and training center plays a vital role in networking graduation students with industry and many technical institutions. It prepares students for the process of recruitment, creates awareness among companies about talent at SIETK, and extends support to them to facilitate recruiting. The PAT is headed by a full-time training and placement officer. A team of faculty members assists in coordinating the work of the PAT center.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides state-of-the-art classrooms and an auditorium for students. Many workshops, PPTs, and one-day seminars, including a national symposium, have been conducted. It can accommodate around 4,000 students. The college provides very spacious and well-seated two seminar halls for students. Each seminar hall can accommodate around 600 students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am highly satisfied. There is a beautiful life to enjoy.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed, but it is not guaranteed that they will join it. The average package is 4 LPA. We can expect a basic package from it. Top recruiting companies are Virtusa and TCS, which we hear from the placement cell. Top roles offered are software developer and data analyst. We can see many seniors who got placements based on machine learning, and it could be advanced for us.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is cool and wonderful. We can enjoy and see peace in college life. Classrooms are so peaceful. There is no Wi-Fi, and it is only for staff members. The library is a more efficient place. The hostel is comfortable, not in a high range, but average. We can adjust there. Canteen food is not good, so we don't eat there. Medical support is available at the sports club. Sports teachers should be clean. Labs are so wonderful, and we can spend time there.

overview_faqs.question: Can Siddharth Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIETK) be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Siddharth Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIETK) is a reputed institute for MCA, B.Tech, UG Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Siddharth Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIETK) has a review rating of 3.9 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Siddharth Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIETK) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and it gives good knowledge.

content.Placements: Our college offers Computer Science and Engineering in different allied courses like AIML, Cybersecurity etc. The percentage of students placed in my course is nearly 200 members. The highest package is 15 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Many students have got internship from our course in companies like IBM, Microsoft etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good in our college and the infrastructure available in our college is so good. There is a library which has many books we can study well and gain knowledge. It is free of cost. There are hostel facilities for the students also. In the mess there is food available. There is a canteen also and there is a big playground in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College life is very good but the study is average. Placements are also average, and events are best

content.Placements: Only 50% of students are placed. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra visit our campus. 80% of students get internships in private companies. Top roles offered are HR, employees, CEO, etc.
content.Infrastructure: I would rate our college infrastructure as 7/10. There is a lack of facilities in the hostel, but the college is good. Wi-Fi is available. The infrastructure is somewhat bad. The food is just okay. Labs are good, classrooms are average. The library is very good. I like the canteen. There are no medical facilities in college. But in the hostel, the medical facilities are available. The college also shows interest in sports, games, and events.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in the Tirupati surroundings.

content.Placements: Siddharth College students get placed with a package of 40 LPA. Placements and training center plays a vital role in networking graduation students with industry and many technical institutions. It prepares students for the process of recruitment, creates awareness among companies about talent at SIETK, and extends support to them to facilitate recruiting. The PAT is headed by a full-time training and placement officer. A team of faculty members assists in coordinating the work of the PAT center.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides state-of-the-art classrooms and an auditorium for students. Many workshops, PPTs, and one-day seminars, including a national symposium, have been conducted. It can accommodate around 4,000 students. The college provides very spacious and well-seated two seminar halls for students. Each seminar hall can accommodate around 600 students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied. There is a beautiful life to enjoy.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed, but it is not guaranteed that they will join it. The average package is 4 LPA. We can expect a basic package from it. Top recruiting companies are Virtusa and TCS, which we hear from the placement cell. Top roles offered are software developer and data analyst. We can see many seniors who got placements based on machine learning, and it could be advanced for us.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is cool and wonderful. We can enjoy and see peace in college life. Classrooms are so peaceful. There is no Wi-Fi, and it is only for staff members. The library is a more efficient place. The hostel is comfortable, not in a high range, but average. We can adjust there. Canteen food is not good, so we don't eat there. Medical support is available at the sports club. Sports teachers should be clean. Labs are so wonderful, and we can spend time there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty members and placements are good.

content.Placements: Approximately 75 to 80% of students got placed through on-campus placement drives. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. Some of the big companies that hire students from our course like Accenture, Capgemini, Deloitte, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our department had good infrastructure, and the entire campus had Wi-Fi connectivity. Classrooms were clean and spacious. Most of the classrooms had projectors and whiteboards for teaching. The mess food was average, not like home-cooked food, and the hostel maintenance was good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Beautiful College and Campus life.

content.Placements: Jain College Jayanagar Bengaluru is good college for placements and almost 45% of the students are placed every year, the average LPA is around 5lakhs, the highest was 8LPA and the lowest was 3LPA. This college gets companies like Accenture google microsoft Elite EY and many more The internship was optional to students and the percentage was 12%. The top roles were marketing head, sales associate Heads of department Financial director and many more .
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, e-reading library reading rooms computer labs interactive rooms auditoriums huge playgrounds indoor stadium two wheeler parking canteen facilities are available. Medical facilities are available for time to time when needed.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Feb-26) Master of Business Administration (MBA) + Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: It is a good institute to study.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in various companies. Infosys, TCS, Cafe Coffee Day, Vaco, and various banks come here for recruitment. The lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA, and the highest package was around 9 LPA. 100% of students got internships. Various roles are offered in sales, finance and media fields.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good, huge and spacious. Many amenities are available. The hostel is far from college, yet it has very nice rooms, and the food quality is great. The facilities like library, sports rooms and in-house campus pod are available for all. It has a 9-floor building with good lifts. The security is very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is an overrated and over-priced university.

content.Placements: Analyst, associate, etc., roles are offered here. About 30% of students were placed from here. The highest salary package offered was in the range of 8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The average salary package offered was 5 LPA. Top companies which visit here for placements include Deloitte, Ernst and Young, PwC and KPMG. About 20% of students opted for internships in big four companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is on a premise originally constructed for a hospital. Facilities available here include canteen, library and smart classrooms. The quality of facilities provided here is average. The food served here is not really hygienic. Our college doesn't focus on sports at all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you to choose our college.

content.Placements: Our college offers 100% placements to students, and it allows every student to attend interviews in all the companies which visit our college. Top recruiting companies for our college include big 4 companies, i.e., EY, Deloitte, KPMG and PwC, and they offer placements with various profiles in the finance sector. The highest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA for BBA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. Students are supposed to attend interviews for internships. A huge range of companies, be it MNCs or startups visit our college to conduct interviews. Our college also hosts walk-in drives for about more than 30 companies at once, and students can participate in them. Students can attend interviews as well as be a part of the organising committee, which is responsible for conducting walk-in drives successfully.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Feb-26) Master of Business Administration (MBA) + Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jain College,Jayanagar.

content.Placements: The placement cell in the college is moderate. The focus on this course's placements is in somewhat at the last option in comparison to the rest of the courses. Companies in which we appear are not top tier companies, and they are like the rest of the companies.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It is confined a bit as the campus broadly includes only one 8-floor building and little parking space. Still, the infrastructure of the building is good, and classrooms and all halls are also decent.

reviews.review_text: Good infrastructural facilities, along with modern technology, are provided to us. There are Wi-Fi facilities. Our college has a good library where computers are provided to gain knowledge and also has books from all fields to gain information. Our college also provides us with good extracurricular activities. There are also good medical staff members in case of any emergency.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to be in for peer learning and have fun at the same time.
reviews.review_text: The structure of the course was streamlined, and all the facilities were provided, which were necessary. Hostels were off-campus, but the location of the college helped as there were a lot of PG's nearby. The college hosted about 1,000 students, so the facilities provided were enough to cater to the needs of the students.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with our college because we had the best teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college has facilities such as huge classrooms and friendly campus. The entire campus is WI-Fi enabled. There is also a wonderful computer lab where students are allowed to access the computer at any time, and even internal tests can be written on the same computer. The hostel would be much suited for the North Indians because of the food, and on the other hand, the rooms are pretty good. Every year there will be a tournament such as a football, cricket, carrom, table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a medium-sized college with facilities.
reviews.review_text: The library is available from 8 am to 6 pm with all facilities like usage of laptop, computer access, most of the top local author books, one librarian, three sub librarians and 5 working staff members. Our college provides decent speed internet facility. Racks are available in the library to keep the bags. There will be proper maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: In total, I would say Jain college is worth joining as it has qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text:
1. Infrastructure is amazing with all facilities like labs, library, projector, Wi-Fi and other basics. 
2. Hostel facilities are very nice, we have been provided quality food with medical facilities 24/7 also hostel conducts sports and gaming activities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Students are taught well in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not so good but can be managed. It doesn't have any campus. reviews.review_heading: Absolutely Dissatisfied with the Hostel of Jain college, good placements in 2019.
reviews.review_text:
1. The infrastructure is good no doubt. The college follows modern techniques of teaching. Labs and classroom are very nice and comfortable. We have no Wi-Fi 
2. The quality of hostel is very bad. They provide very tasteless food and very unhealthy food. Most of students skip their canteen meal and eat from outside. Plus the hostel is far away from the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It has knowledgeable faculty, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The huge library is available at our college, and we can get so many books as per our requirements. Wi-Fi facility is available on our campus. Classrooms are good, neat and clean. Computer labs are available, and there are more than 100 computers. The college conducts are field trips and industrial visits. Every day there will be an ID card and dress checking at our college.

reviews.review_heading: There is good infrastructure but disappointed with management and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure contains air-conditioned classrooms, labs, libraries, auditoriums and gazebo. It also has a full-time canteen accessible by students at the point of time at subsidized prices with a decent taste and quality of the food items.
